system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. model_output: I'll search for reliable sources about the Eiffel Tower's completion and inauguration date.

Web search results for query: "Eiffel Tower completion inauguration 1889"

Links: [{"title":"130th anniversary focus on 1889 - The Eiffel Tower","url":"https://www.toureiffel.paris/en/news/130-years/1889-2019-130-years-amazement"},{"title":"Eiffel Tower opens in Paris | March 31, 1889 | HISTORY","url":"https://www.history.com/this-day-in-history/march-31/eiffel-tower-opens"},{"title":"The Eiffel tower's inauguration and first visitors — Google Arts & Culture","url":"https://artsandculture.google.com/story/the-eiffel-tower-s-inauguration-and-first-visitors-tour-eiffel/dgWBQDgw3RwA8A?hl=en"},{"title":"TODAY IN HISTORY: Inauguration of the Eiffel Tower (March 31, 1889) - World Footprints","url":"https://worldfootprints.com/world-briefs/today-in-history-inauguration-of-the-eiffel-tower-march-31-1889/"},{"title":"133 years and 330 metres - The Eiffel Tower","url":"https://www.toureiffel.paris/en/news/history-and-culture/133-years-and-1083-feet"},{"title":"The Eiffel Tower at 125 Years","url":"https://www.structuremag.org/article/the-eiffel-tower-at-125-years/"},{"title":"Eiffel Tower History: From Controversial Landmark to Paris' Icon","url":"https://www.paristickets.com/eiffel-tower/history/"},{"title":"From the Vault: Inauguration of the Eiffel Tower","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/world/vault-inauguration-eiffel-tower-n67876"},{"title":"The History and construction of the Eiffel Tower | Un jour de plus à Paris","url":"https://www.unjourdeplusaparis.com/en/paris-reportage/histoire-construction-tour-eiffel"},{"title":"Inauguration of the Eiffel tower","url":"https://www.wonders-of-the-world.net/Eiffel-Tower/Inauguration-of-the-Eiffel-tower.php"}]

Based on the search results, here's the information about the Eiffel Tower's completion and inauguration in 1889:

## Completion and Inauguration Date

The construction of the Eiffel Tower structure was completed on Sunday, March 31, 1889, and it was inaugurated at 1:30 p.m. while workers were still working on the interior fittings and the elevators hadn't been installed yet.

## Inauguration Ceremony

Gustave Eiffel raised a French flag at the top of the Tower in the presence of the Director of the World's Fair and some of his employees, and certain personalities from the Government and the City of Paris. After climbing the 1,710 steps that led to the top of the Tower, they unfurled the French flag to the sound of a 21-gun salute.

## Construction Timeline

Construction of the Eiffel Tower began in 1887 and was finished in record time for a structure of its size – 2 years, 2 months and 5 days.

## Public Opening

It's worth noting that the official inauguration of the Eiffel Tower was on May 15th, 1889, the opening day of the Exposition Universelle. This was the public opening date for the 1889 World's Fair, while the March 31 inauguration was the structural completion ceremony.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

model_output:
The Eiffel Tower was completed and inaugurated in 1889, with the structural completion on March 31 and the official public opening on May 15 of that year.

Sources:
- [Eiffel Tower opens in Paris | March 31, 1889 | HISTORY](https://www.history.com/this-day-in-history/march-31/eiffel-tower-opens)
- [The Eiffel Tower — Official site](https://www.toureiffel.paris/en/news/130-years/1889-2019-130-years-amazement)
